It's confusing, I'm a little bit scared I might lose my money. So what I want you to do is I want you to give me a three step plan. What you'll find is that three step plan, those three baby steps that you give them, dramatically increase the amount of engagement that you get. Because they don't have to predict the future, they know the future is step one, step two, step three. The next thing that you need is a call to action. And then give me two more sound bites. Explain what life will look like if I solve the problem, and explain what life will look like if I don't.
